untranslatable_reason: The '12 New Price Lines' pattern is a multi-candle contextual pattern that cannot be operationalized with the allowed indicators. It requires tracking a specific sequence of price action (12 consecutive candles making new highs) and detecting the exact moment of reversal on the 13th candle. This requires custom pattern recognition logic beyond the scope of single-candle and moving average comparisons.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the core signal intent: a tall candle with long upper wick (reversal signal) combined with price breaking below the 50-day moving average (uptrend termination). The regime targets 'TRENDING_UP' because the pattern identifies uptrend reversals. Exit conditions use reversal back above sma_50 as a reasonable stop-out. The '12 New Price Lines' pattern itself requires multi-bar sequence detection not available in the allowed indicator set.
